# Shared-file drift allow-list  (a11oy <-> killinchu)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Read by .github/shared-file-drift-check.py. One repo-relative path per line;
# blank lines and `#` comments ignored. KEEP THIS FILE IDENTICAL IN BOTH REPOS.
#
# A path here is a file that BOTH repos ship and that the guard would otherwise
# require to be byte-identical, but which is *currently* allowed to differ. The
# guard is a ratchet:
#   * Files NOT listed here must stay byte-identical across the two repos, or the
#     build FAILS (this blocks NEW drift).
#   * Files listed here are reported but do not fail the build (pre-existing,
#     accepted-pending-reconciliation drift).
#   * When a listed file becomes identical again, the guard WARNS so this entry
#     can be removed — tightening the ratchet over time.
#
# To accept a deliberate divergence: add the path with a short reason.
# To reconcile a divergence: sync the file in both repos, then delete its line.
#
# Seeded 2026-06-08 with the drift that already existed when the guard was added.
# These ARE meant to be shared modules; they have silently diverged and should be
# reconciled (sync the canonical copy into both repos) when convenient.
a11oy_code_engine.py
live_wires_3d.js
operator_shell_v4.py
szl_alloy_models.py
szl_brain.py
szl_formulas.py
szl_khipu_consensus.py
szl_khipu_lmdb.py
szl_live_wires.py
szl_llm_registry.py
szl_provenance.py
szl_rag.py
